---
title: Preliminary (mis) Citation accuracy/integrity tool

toc: true

author:
  - name: Mink Veltman
    corresponding: true
    email: m.veltman@student.tue.nl
    affiliations:
      - id: id1
        name: "Eindhoven University of Technology"
        group: 
        department: Human-Technology Interaction


author-note:
  disclosures:
    conflict of interest: The author has no conflict of interest to declare.

execute: 
  echo: false
  cache: false

abstract: |

  

keywords: [citations, tool, citation integrity]

word-count: true
floatsintext: true
numbered-lines: false
first-page: 1

bibliography: references.bib
link-citations: true
linkcolor: pink

mask: false
meta-analysis: false


draft-date: false
lang: en

fontsize: 12pt
draftall: false
nocorrespondence: true
suppress-author-note: true

format:
  apaquarto-pdf:
    documentmode: stu
    keep-tex: true
---

# Introduction

## Miscitations in science

## Why miscitations matter

## Existing approaches and limitations

## The present study

# Operationalization and definition of miscitations

## Taxonomy of miscitation types

## Coding procedure

## Inter-rater reliability

# User survey

## Methods

### Participants

### Materials

### Procedure

## Results

### Awareness and experience of miscitations

### Tool needs and preferences

# Software design

## Design requirements

## Database

## Analyzer application

## Reporter application

## Validation and testing

# Discussion

## Key findings

## Limitations

## Future directions
